headline: Fortinet Cut to Hold at DZ Bank, Price Target Set at $125: Is Cybersecurity Losing Steam?
summary: Fortinet (NASDAQ:FTNT) just received an analyst downgrade from DZ Bank, with the firm moving to a Hold rating and a $125 price target. The same DZ Bank team simultaneously cut CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) to Sell with a $500 price target, signaling a broader cautious turn on cybersecurity. For prudent investors, the move suggests valuation discipline is ... Fortinet Cut to Hold at DZ Bank, Price Target Set at $125: Is Cybersecurity Losing Steam?

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Palo Alto Networks, Raises Price Target to $275
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Junaid Siddiqui   maintains Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ:PANW) with a Buy and raises the price target from $200 to $275.

headline: Why Zscaler’s Recent Rally Could Just Be Getting Started
summary: Zscaler (NASDAQ: ZS) stock has been on a roller coaster. The stock hit an all-time high of $368 in 2021. Even after a strong rebound recently, it still trades around $175. That means investors who bought near the top are still deep underwater, even as the stock has surged roughly 30% in the past month alone.
